reason: Successfully executed browser navigation test through SuperAgent - agent opened browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved page title "Example Domain", and provided the expected response.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent dashboard showing agents in sidebar.
Step 2: Clicked on agent "QA-20260617-214056-3rbe" in sidebar - Agent chat interface opened, showing empty chat with input field ready for message.
Step 3: Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into chat input - Message was successfully entered into the textbox.
Step 4: Clicked "Send message" button - Message was sent and agent started processing (status changed to "working").
Step 5: Waited for agent response (waited up to 3 minutes, completed in 12 seconds) - Agent finished processing and provided complete response with browser interaction details.
Step 6: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain". I've closed the browser." The agent successfully:
